overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a medieval village exploration. The player character walks along dirt paths past thatched-roof farmhouses, interacts with the environment by passing through a stone archway and entering a wooden building. The setting is a sunny rural village with traditional wooden architecture and scattered NPCs.

scene_state.functional_zone: village dirt road with traditional farmhouses

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the village dirt path past wooden structures

entered.detail: traditional wattle and daub construction with steep thatched roof and small windows
wooden wagon with large spoked wheels parked beside the farmhouse
tall tree with white bark and hanging branches visible in the distance
simple wooden post fence running along the left side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt village path bordered by traditional thatched-roof farmhouses. A wooden cart sits beside one building while a large birch tree and wooden fence line the left side of the path under a partly cloudy sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy village edge with shade tree and wheat fields

events.description: approaches an NPC sitting under the shade of a large birch tree

agents.ego_description: walking toward a shaded area under a large tree where a villager is seated

notable_agents.action: sitting under the birch tree, engaged in handcraft activity

entered.detail: traditional wooden windmill structure visible in the distance beyond the fields
small wooden outbuilding with thatched roof near the field edge
golden wheat crops growing in the open fields beyond the village

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the main path onto a grassy area approaching a large birch tree. An NPC sits in the shade working on something, with a wooden windmill and golden wheat fields visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: village center with clustered thatched buildings

events.description: moves from open fields back into the village center with closely packed buildings

agents.ego_description: navigating through the village center between closely packed thatched farmhouses

entered.detail: stone masonry archway forming an entrance to an inner courtyard

segments.scene_description: The character walks through the village center passing multiple thatched-roof buildings. A stone archway becomes visible in the distance as the character approaches the village square, leaving the open fields behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: village courtyard with stone archway entrance

events.description: passes through the stone archway into an enclosed courtyard area
dog runs across the courtyard path from right to left

agents.ego_description: walking through the stone archway and exploring the village courtyard

notable_agents.action: sitting on a wooden bench near the stone wall
dog running across the courtyard toward the right side

entered.detail: traditional wooden well with bucket and stone base in the courtyard center
large wooden barn with steep thatched roof and stone foundation
rustic wooden pole fence enclosing the courtyard area

segments.scene_description: The character passes through the stone archway into a village courtyard containing a wooden well and various farm buildings. An NPC sits on a bench to the left while a dog moves through the area, and the space feels more enclosed than the open road.

events.description: enters the dark wooden interior of a farmhouse through a low doorway
exits the building back into the sunlit courtyard

agents.ego_description: entering a dark wooden building, walking through the dim interior, and exiting back to the courtyard

notable_agents.action: standing inside the building near the far exit doorway

entered.detail: low wooden doorway with dark interior visible beyond
heavy timber support beams and rafters visible in the ceiling
wooden shelves and household items along the left wall

segments.scene_description: The character enters a dark wooden farmhouse through a low doorway, walks through the dimly lit interior with visible wooden beams and furniture, passing an NPC inside, then exits back into the sunlit courtyard.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the open, sunlit outskirts of a medieval village into its enclosed heart and the dim interior of a farmhouse. It begins along a dirt path lined with thatched-roof farmhouses and a large birch tree under a partly cloudy sky. As the camera moves onto a grassy area, the view expands to reveal a wooden windmill and golden wheat fields before shifting back toward the village center and a distant stone archway. The scene then transitions through the archway into a more confined courtyard featuring a wooden well and a roaming dog, moving from the openness of the fields to a structured communal space. Finally, the camera passes through a low doorway into the shadowy, beam-filled interior of a wooden farmhouse before emerging once more into the bright sunlight of the courtyard.
